title: PMA-treated THP-1 cells as non-infection control
source_name_ch1: PMA-treated THP-1 cells as non-infection control
growth_protocol_ch1: M. tuberculosis strains were grown in Middlebrook 7H9 broth (BD Difco) supplemented with 10 % of albumin-dextrose-catalase (OADC) enrichment and 0.05 % tween 80 at 37°C with shaking at 100 rpm. Bacteria were cultured until exponential phase, then aliquoted and frozen at -80℃. THP-1 cells was maintained at 37°C in 5% CO2 in RPMI 1640 media (Life Technologies) supplemented with 10% of FBS. Prior to infection, THP-1 cells were differentiated into macrophage-like cells in T-75 flasks (1×107 cells/flask) with 200nM phorbol myristate acetate (PMA, Sigma-Aldrich) for 24h followed by incubation with fresh media without PMA for 24h. At time points of 4h, 18h and 48h, cell were lysed with 2 ml of Trizol (Life Technologies) for RNA extraction.
extract_protocol_ch1: Trizol extraction of total RNA was performed according to the manufacturer's instructions.
label_protocol_ch1: Biotinylated cRNA were prepared according to the standard Affymetrix protocol from 5 micrograms total RNA (Expression Analysis Technical Manual, 2001, Affymetrix).
hyb_protocol: The biotinylated cRNA was then fragmented and subjected to hybridization on Human Genome U133 Plus 2.0 Array (Affymetrix, USA).
scan_protocol: An affymetrix Gene Chip Scanner 3000 was used to scan the probe arrays
description: PMA-treated THP-1 cells as non-infection control
data_processing: These CEL raw expression data were normalized using Robust Multi-array Averaging (RMA) with quantile normalization in R (Bioconductor)

Bacteria were cultured until exponential phase, then aliquoted and frozen at -80℃. THP-1 cells was maintained at 37°C in 5% CO2 in RPMI 1640 media (Life Technologies) supplemented with 10% of FBS. Prior to infection, THP-1 cells were differentiated into macrophage-like cells in T-75 flasks (1×107 cells/flask) with 200nM phorbol myristate acetate (PMA, Sigma-Aldrich) for 24h followed by incubation with fresh media without PMA for 24h. At time points of 4h, 18h and 48h, cell were lysed with 2 ml of Trizol (Life Technologies) for RNA extraction.
extract_protocol_ch1: Trizol extraction of total RNA was performed according to the manufacturer's instructions.
label_protocol_ch1: Biotinylated cRNA were prepared according to the standard Affymetrix protocol from 5 micrograms total RNA (Expression Analysis Technical Manual, 2001, Affymetrix).
hyb_protocol: The biotinylated cRNA was then fragmented and subjected to hybridization on Human Genome U133 Plus 2.0 Array (Affymetrix, USA).
scan_protocol: An affymetrix Gene Chip Scanner 3000 was used to scan the probe arrays
description: THP1-cells infected by CHN50.1 strains at 48h
data_processing: These CEL raw expression data were normalized using Robust Multi-array Averaging (RMA) with quantile normalization in R (Bioconductor)

growth_protocol_ch1: M. tuberculosis strains were grown in Middlebrook 7H9 broth (BD Difco) supplemented with 10 % of albumin-dextrose-catalase (OADC) enrichment and 0.05 % tween 80 at 37°C with shaking at 100 rpm. Bacteria were cultured until exponential phase, then aliquoted and frozen at -80℃. THP-1 cells was maintained at 37°C in 5% CO2 in RPMI 1640 media (Life Technologies) supplemented with 10% of FBS. Prior to infection, THP-1 cells were differentiated into macrophage-like cells in T-75 flasks (1×107 cells/flask) with 200nM phorbol myristate acetate (PMA, Sigma-Aldrich) for 24h followed by incubation with fresh media without PMA for 24h. At time points of 4h, 18h and 48h, cell were lysed with 2 ml of Trizol (Life Technologies) for RNA extraction.
extract_protocol_ch1: Trizol extraction of total RNA was performed according to the manufacturer's instructions.
label_protocol_ch1: Biotinylated cRNA were prepared according to the standard Affymetrix protocol from 5 micrograms total RNA (Expression Analysis Technical Manual, 2001, Affymetrix).
hyb_protocol: The biotinylated cRNA was then fragmented and subjected to hybridization on Human Genome U133 Plus 2.0 Array (Affymetrix, USA).
scan_protocol: An affymetrix Gene Chip Scanner 3000 was used to scan the probe arrays
description: THP1-cells infected by H37Rv strains at 48h, Replication 2
data_processing: These CEL raw expression data were normalized using Robust Multi-array Averaging (RMA) with quantile normalization in R (Bioconductor)
